message:
fix(combinator): add defensive assertions in hedge_outcomes and preserve panics through timeout

Two combinator safety improvements:

hedge_outcomes: When backup_spawned is false, the function should never
receive a backup_outcome or a winner value — those are only meaningful
when a backup was actually launched. Previously this was an implicit
invariant enforced only by control flow. Now explicit debug_assert!-style
panic assertions guard the "primary completed before hedge deadline" path,
catching caller bugs that pass stale backup state when no backup ran.
Adds two #[should_panic] tests verifying both assertion paths.

make_timed_result: When a timed-out operation panics during drain (e.g.,
the future panics while being cancelled after the deadline fires), the
panic payload was previously masked and reported as a plain TimedOut error.
This loses critical diagnostic information. Now, if the outcome is
Outcome::Panicked, it is surfaced as TimedResult::Completed(Panicked)
regardless of the completed_in_time flag, ensuring panics are never
silently downgraded. Adds a test confirming panicked outcomes survive
through the timeout path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
